chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6851 of 2021 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) 1.For hearing of CMA No.29657/2021 2.For hearing of CMA No.29658/2021 3.For hearing of main case. 31.01.2025 Mr.Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for the Respondent No.2 Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Pursuant to the last order Mr.Muhammad Waqas Maqsood, Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue, E&C, Unit-I, Range-A, Zone-I, Regional Tax Office, Hyderabad is present and states that the impugned order has been wrongly rendered. He states that the same is being recalled immediately. In view of the representation as aforesaid, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the object of this petition has been satisfied, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
